visible_entities.action: standing behind a bar counter, stirring a red drink with a straw, then holding the glass

Two tall glasses filled with a red beverage
visible_entities.action: sitting on white napkins on the counter

Small bottle of Tabasco sauce

atomic_facts.fact: A man in a white apron is stirring a red drink in a tall glass.
A large bottle of V8 juice is visible on the bar counter.
The man holds the glass with his left hand after stirring.
A small bottle of Tabasco sauce is on the counter.
There are two red drinks on the counter.

spatial: The scene is a bar. A man stands behind the counter in the center. In the foreground on the counter are a V8 bottle, a Tabasco bottle, two red drinks, and a napkin holder. The background is filled with shelves of liquor bottles on the left and other bar equipment on the right.
